reforms.description: The 1998 Budget includes increased funding for research and development, aiming to enhance innovation and productivity in the economy. Additionally, the Plan de Actuacion Tecnologico Industrial managed by the Ministry of Industry supported 637 projects in 1995 at a cost of Ptas 11.6 billion, aimed at enhancing technological development.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Increased funding for R&D is expected to enhance innovation and productivity, contributing positively to economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The reforms have been executed as part of the national budget and specific plans.
reforms.importance_rationale: While the reforms are significant, they do not represent a complete overhaul of the funding system.
reforms.source_quote: The Budget increases funding for active labour market policies, research and development, raises spending on education and maintains public investment as a share of GDP.

reforms.description: The Spanish government announced a major Modernisation Programme aimed at restructuring and privatising state-owned enterprises to improve efficiency and maintain employment in the sector.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The restructuring and privatisation of state-owned enterprises is expected to enhance efficiency and productivity.
reforms.status_evidence: The programme has been put into action as part of government policy.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant structural change in the management of state-owned enterprises.
reforms.source_quote: In June 1996, the Government announced an ambitious programme to modernise the State-owned enterprise sector so as to ensure its future viability.

reforms.description: The Spanish venture capital market remains under-developed, with government agencies providing a significant portion of new venture capital raised, indicating a need for reform to enhance private sector involvement and early-stage investments.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The under-development of the venture capital market limits the potential for innovation and startup growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The need for reform has been identified but no specific measures have been implemented yet.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform highlights a significant issue but does not propose a concrete solution yet.
reforms.source_quote: The Spanish venture capital market remains relatively under-developed and to some extent still reflects a government dominated origin.

reforms.description: The Spanish government announced a new strategy for SMEs aimed at promoting entrepreneurship, which includes institutional changes, administrative simplification, and improved access to information and technology. Additionally, a new support programme for entrepreneurial development targeting SMEs has been launched for 1997-99, co-financed by EU funds, emphasizing information, advice, and support for design and innovation.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The strategy and support programme are designed to enhance entrepreneurship and innovation among SMEs, which is beneficial for economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The strategy and support programme have been executed as part of government policy.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant initiative to support SMEs and promote entrepreneurship.
reforms.source_quote: An important new support programme on ‘entrepreneurial development’, with several different objectives and targeted on SMEs, has been launched for the years 1997-99 with 50 per cent co-financed by EU funds.

reforms.description: National and regional governments have initiated various programs to improve the diffusion and transfer of innovation to firms, supported by significant EU funding.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Improving the transfer of innovation to firms is expected to enhance productivity and competitiveness.
reforms.status_evidence: The programs have been initiated and are currently in operation.
reforms.importance_rationale: While the programs are beneficial, they are part of ongoing efforts rather than a major overhaul.
reforms.source_quote: Both national and regional governments have taken a number of initiatives in order to improve diffusion and transfer of innovation to firms, with significant funding also coming from the EU.

reforms.description: The Sociedad para el Desarrollo del Disen˜o y la Innovacion (DDI) has financed around 1,000 projects since its creation in 1992, aiming to improve product quality, image, design, and competitiveness.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Financing projects that improve design and innovation contributes to overall competitiveness and productivity.
reforms.status_evidence: The DDI has been operational and financing projects since its establishment.
reforms.importance_rationale: While the DDI has supported many projects, it does not represent a major reform in the innovation landscape.
reforms.source_quote: The Sociedad para el Desarrollo del Disen˜o y la Innovacion (DDI), whose aim is to improve the quality, the image, the design and the competitiveness of products, has financed around 1,000 projects since its creation in 1992.
